top3.sql:
SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL AND frameEffects != ''
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL AND frameEffects != ''
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 
  AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL 
  AND frameEffects != ''
  AND (frameEffects LIKE '%borderless%' OR frameEffects LIKE '%full-art%' OR frameEffects LIKE '%extended-art%')
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 
  AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL 
  AND frameEffects != ''
  AND (frameEffects LIKE '%showcase%' OR frameEffects LIKE '%extendedart%' OR frameEffects LIKE '%borderless%')
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL AND frameEffects != ''
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 
  AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL 
  AND frameEffects != ''
  AND (frameEffects LIKE '%borderless%' OR frameEffects LIKE '%full-art%' OR frameEffects LIKE '%extended-art%')
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 
  AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL 
  AND frameEffects != ''
  AND convertedManaCost <= 3
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT frameEffects, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM cards
WHERE hasFoil = 1 AND frameEffects IS NOT NULL AND frameEffects != ''
GROUP BY frameEffects
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 1;
